response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken announcement matches the venue intro at the end of the video. No lyrical song was performed. 2. JSON Usage: Manual transcription utilized for on-screen announcement texts during the first half and spoken venue greetings at the end. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the prominent visual announcements to their screen visibility, followed by audio-anchored timestamps for the performer's live voice.

subtitles.original: 開演までしばらくお待ちください
subtitles.english: The concert will be starting soon.

subtitles.original: 演出の都合上、照明の明滅にご注意ください / 声出し応援OKです
subtitles.english: Please be aware of flashing lights / Cheering loudly is OK.

subtitles.original: 本日は、ReGLOSS 1st Live「Flashpoint」にご来場いただき、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to ReGLOSS 1st Live "Flashpoint" today!
